name: Men's Alpine Shell Jacket
description: A completely waterproof, breathable shell designed for high-altitude wind and rain.

name: Men's Convertible Trail Pants
description: Durable nylon pants that easily zip off into shorts for fluctuating trail temperatures.

name: Men's Merino Base Layer Top
description: Odor-resistant, moisture-wicking merino wool for core temperature regulation.

name: Men's Vented Hiking Button-Up
description: UPF 50+ sun protection with a back mesh vent for maximum airflow on hot days.

name: Men's All-Weather Trekking Shorts
description: Lightweight, quick-drying shorts with secure zipper pockets.

name: Women's Summit Down Jacket
description: 800-fill responsibly sourced down provides incredible warmth in a packable profile.

name: Women's Trail Blazer Leggings
description: Abrasion-resistant side panels and deep thigh pockets make these perfect for rugged trails.

name: Women's Merino Base Layer Bottoms
description: Next-to-skin comfort for cold weather layering without the bulk.

name: Women's Sun-Shield Long Sleeve
description: Ultra-lightweight hooded sun shirt with UPF 40 protection.

name: Women's Peak Explorer Shorts
description: Stretchy, water-resistant shorts with a comfortable wide waistband.

name: Alpenglow 2-Person Tent
description: A lightweight, three-season backpacking tent with dual vestibules.

name: Starlight 15-Degree Sleeping Bag
description: Mummy-style sleeping bag designed to keep you warm well below freezing.

name: Cloud-Rest Insulated Sleeping Pad
description: 3.5 inches of supportive loft with an R-value of 4.2 for year-round comfort.

name: Ultralight Camp Chair
description: Packs down to the size of a water bottle but holds up to 250 lbs.

name: Solar-Powered LED Lantern
description: Waterproof lantern that charges via sunlight or USB.

name: PocketRocket Camp Stove
description: Boils 1 liter of water in under 3.5 minutes. Fuel sold separately.

name: Titanium 2-Pot Cook Set
description: Incredibly durable and lightweight nesting pots for trailside meals.

name: Outdoor Durable Utensils
description: Simple utensils kit for eating meals on the go.

name: Insulated Camp Mug 14oz
description: Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps your morning coffee piping hot.

name: Solar Water Filter
description: Filters up to 3 liters of backcountry water in minutes with zero pumping required.

name: Traverse 65L Backpack
description: Adjustable suspension system and highly breathable mesh back panel for multi-day trips.

name: Carbon Fiber Trekking Poles
description: Shock-absorbing, ultra-light poles that save your knees on steep descents.

name: Lumina 400 Lumen Headlamp
description: Features multiple brightness settings and a red-light mode for preserving night vision.

name: 3-Liter Hydration Reservoir
description: Leak-proof bladder with a high-flow bite valve, compatible with most daypacks.

name: Hiking Compass
description: Simple yet reliable compass ready to guide you on your journey.

name: Men's Ridge Trekker Boots
description: Mid-height waterproof boots providing excellent ankle support and rugged traction.

name: Women's Ridge Trekker Boots
description: Mid-height waterproof boots providing excellent ankle support and rugged traction.

name: Swift-Stride Trail Runners
description: Unisex design featuring highly responsive foam and aggressive lugs for loose terrain.

name: Merino Wool Hiking Socks
description: Seamless toe construction and targeted cushioning to prevent blisters on long miles.

name: Waterproof Trail Gaiters
description: Keeps rocks, mud, and snow out of your boots. Attaches securely to most footwear.
